creator: bryn@nwlink.com
text:
Cron job uses scp to copy files to other machines, crashes randomly at least once a day while doing scp:

Fatal trap 19: non-maskable interrupt trap while in kernel mode
instruction pointer     = 0x8:0xc03060f5
stack pointer           = 0x10:0xd0d9fdc8
frame pointer           = 0x10:0xd0d9ff2c
code segment            = base 0x0, limit 0xfffff, type 0x1b
                        = DPL 0, pres 1, def32 1, gran 1
processor eflags        = interrupt enabled, IOPL = 0
current process         = 37245 (ssh)
interrupt mask          = none
trap number             = 19
panic: non-maskable interrupt trap

syncing disks... 28 28 23 2 
done
Uptime: 1d12h51m28s
amr0: flushing cache...done
Automatic reboot in 15 seconds - press a key on the console to abort
Rebooting...

How-To-Repeat: Set up a cron job to use the system-included scp to copy a file regularly to another machine and let run, seems to happen every 30-40 hours.
